differential_diagnoses: Neurodegenerative dementia with secondary inflammatory process
next_steps: Send serum and CSF for a comprehensive autoimmune and paraneoplastic encephalopathy antibody panel
Perform lumbar puncture for CSF 14-3-3 protein, RT-QuIC, and tau protein analysis
Conduct whole-body FDG-PET/CT to evaluate for occult malignancy
Initiate a trial of high-dose intravenous corticosteroids after ruling out active infection
Perform comprehensive neuro-psychological testing to characterize the cognitive phenotype
